Description: Assessment rules for SharePoint Online, OneDrive for Business, Microsoft Teams, and collaboration governance — covering external sharing, anonymous links, guest access, sensitivity labels, and retention.

Rules.CheckName: SharePoint and OneDrive External Sharing Level
Rules.SecureScoreMapping: Review SharePoint Online external sharing settings
Rules.Description: Checks the tenant-wide SharePoint and OneDrive external sharing capability. Flags if Anyone (anonymous) sharing is enabled at the tenant level, which allows sharing without authentication.

Rules.SecureScoreMapping: Set expiration date for Anyone links
Rules.Description: Verifies that anonymous (Anyone) sharing links are configured to expire. Without expiration, a shared link provides permanent access to files even after the sharing relationship ends.

Rules.SecureScoreMapping: Set expiration date for external sharing links
Rules.Description: Checks that external user (guest) sharing links are configured to expire automatically. Without expiration, former collaborators and external guests retain indefinite access to shared content.

Rules.SecureScoreMapping: Set default sharing link scope to specific people
Rules.Description: Checks whether the default sharing link scope for SharePoint and OneDrive is set to 'Specific people' rather than 'Anyone' or 'People in your organization'. The default link type affects which sharing option is pre-selected when users share files.

Checks the Microsoft 365 Groups directory settings controlling whether guests can be added to groups and whether guests can access group content. Reviews the AllowGuestsToAccessGroups and AllowToAddGuests unified group settings.

Checks whether Microsoft Purview sensitivity labels are published to users via label policies. Labels enable data classification and protection (encryption, access restrictions, watermarks) for files and emails.

Checks whether Microsoft Purview retention policies are configured to govern data lifecycle across Exchange, SharePoint, Teams, and OneDrive. Requires a Security and Compliance PowerShell session (Connect-IPPSSession).

Rules.CheckName: Teams External and Guest Access Configuration
Rules.Description: Checks Teams organization-level external access (federation with other tenants) and guest access policies. Requires the MicrosoftTeams PowerShell module (Connect-MicrosoftTeams). Returns NotAssessed if module is unavailable.
